scripts.test:ci: npm run test && npm run test:perf
scripts.e2e:rn:app:start: cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_LOCAL_AI_SDK_DEBUG=true npm run start --prefix tests/e2e-rn/app
scripts.e2e:rn:app:android: cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_LOCAL_AI_SDK_DEBUG=true npm run android --prefix tests/e2e-rn/app
scripts.e2e:rn:app:ios: cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_LOCAL_AI_SDK_DEBUG=true npm run ios --prefix tests/e2e-rn/app
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:packaging && npm run test:smoke:exports && npm run test:smoke:consumer-pack && npm run test:e2e:rn:preflight && npm run test:e2e:rn:full
